Region.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 32  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceName.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: (?!^[0-9]+$)([a-zA-Z0-9-_' ']+)  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceDescription.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

IPv4Address.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 15  
Pattern: ((25[0-5]|(2[0-4]|1\d|[1-9]|)\d)\.?\b){4}  
Update requires: No interruption

IPv6Address.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 39  
Pattern: (?:[A-Fa-f0-9]{1,4}:){7}[A-Fa-f0-9]{1,4}  
Update requires: No interruption

GlobalResolverIpAddressType.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IPV4 | DUAL_STACK  
Update requires: No interruption

CRResourceStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | OPERATIONAL | UPDATING | DELETING  
Update requires: No interruption

Regions.description: A list of regions the Global Resolver will exist in. This list cannot be updated and will stay fixed for the duration of the Global Resolver.
